products.name: Custom Location Plaque
products.description: A beautifully detailed engraving of your chosen city or location, set in an ornate wood silhouette. Perfect for housewarming gifts or hometown pride.

products.name: Laser-Cut Wood Clock
products.description: Custom laser-cut and stained wood wall clock. Fully customizable design — bring any idea to life.

products.name: Friendship Puzzle Plaque
products.description: A heartfelt engraved puzzle piece plaque, perfect for a best friend or chosen family member. Fully customized with your own message.

products.name: Word Art Framed Sign
products.description: Layered word art with engraved script on a linen-style background, finished in a black wood frame. A meaningful gift that lasts.

products.name: Custom Hanging Sign
products.description: A rustic, handcrafted hanging sign engraved with any name, word, or phrase. Suspended on natural rope and ready to hang.

products.name: Geometric Wall Clock
products.description: A striking geometric laser-cut wall clock with bold lines and a sculptural profile. A statement piece for any room.

products.name: Engraved Slate Coasters
products.description: Set of four slate coasters, each individually engraved with a custom design. Perfect as a seasonal or occasion gift set.

products.name: Landscape Coaster Set
products.description: Mixed media coaster set featuring engraved cork rounds and a slate coaster, each with a different landscape scene.

products.name: Custom Photo Coasters
products.description: Custom engraved coasters featuring your chosen photo or image — a personal, practical gift that gets used every day.
